# [PHASE 4] Frontend - Admin Dashboard & Pages

## Phase Overview
- **Phase Number**: 4
- **Phase Title**: School Admin Panel
- **Estimated Duration**: Week 4-5
- **Dependencies**: Phase 3 Complete, SIS Module Backend
- **Estimated Hours**: 40

## Task Description
Create comprehensive school admin interface

## Detailed Requirements
- [ ] Admin layout with sidebar navigation
- [ ] Dashboard with student count, staff count, fee collection, attendance
- [ ] Student management (list, profile, create, import)
- [ ] Class management (list, detail, create)
- [ ] Staff directory and management
- [ ] Admissions pipeline
- [ ] User management and invitations
- [ ] Marketplace integration
- [ ] School settings and modules
- [ ] Billing and role management
- [ ] Audit log viewer

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All backend functions implemented and tested
- [ ] All frontend pages created and responsive
- [ ] Integration tests passing
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Code review approved

## Files to Create/Modify
`frontend/src/app/(admin)/*`

## Testing Requirements
- [ ] Unit tests for all functions
- [ ] Integration tests for workflows
- [ ] E2E tests for critical user journeys
- [ ] Performance tests if applicable

## Technical Notes
This task is part of Phase 4: School Admin Panel and must be completed according to the implementation plan specifications.
